title: Analyze User Churn Patterns
description: Analyze user churn data to identify patterns and root causes. Build a cohort analysis showing retention by signup month and identify key behaviors that correlate with churn.
requirements: Clean and prepare the churn dataset (handle missing values, outliers)
Build a monthly cohort retention table showing Week 1, Week 4, Week 12 retention
Identify top 3 features that correlate with churn (support tickets, login frequency, feature usage)
Create a churn prediction model using logistic regression
Visualize churn trends using line charts and heatmaps
Write a summary with actionable recommendations
client_context:
Subject: Churn Analysis for Q3

Monthly churn has increased from 5% to 8% over the last quarter. We need to understand why users are leaving and what we can do about it. Data exported from Mixpanel.

- Rohan (Client)
expected_deliverable: Jupyter notebook with cohort analysis, churn model, visualizations, and recommendations

title: Build Revenue Dashboard in Tableau
description: Create a comprehensive revenue dashboard in Tableau that shows revenue by product line, customer segment, geography, and time period. Include forecasting for next quarter.
requirements: Connect Tableau to the revenue database
Revenue by product line (bar chart) with drill-down capability
Revenue by customer segment (pie or treemap)
Revenue trend over time (line chart with 12-month view)
Geographic revenue distribution (filled map)
Time series forecast for next quarter using Tableau forecasting
Interactive filters for date range, product, and region
client_context:
Subject: Executive Revenue Dashboard

The leadership team needs a real-time revenue dashboard for quarterly reviews. This will be used in board meetings. Make it professional and clear.

- Sneha (HR)
expected_deliverable: Tableau workbook with interactive revenue dashboard and forecast

title: Design and Analyze an A/B Test
description: The product team wants to test a new checkout flow. Design the A/B test, calculate required sample size, analyze results, and make a recommendation on whether to launch the new flow.
requirements: Define null and alternative hypotheses for the test
Calculate required sample size (power=0.8, alpha=0.05) for minimum detectable effect of 5%
Analyze test results using appropriate statistical test (t-test or chi-square)
Check for Simpson's paradox across user segments
Visualize results with confidence intervals and effect size
Make a go/no-go recommendation with statistical justification
client_context:
Subject: A/B Test for New Checkout Flow

We redesigned the checkout flow to reduce cart abandonment. We need a properly designed A/B test to validate the new design before full rollout.

- Sarah (Product Manager)
expected_deliverable: A/B test analysis report with hypothesis, sample size calculation, statistical results, and recommendation

title: Create Marketing Campaign Performance Analysis
description: Analyze the performance of the last quarter's marketing campaigns across channels (Google Ads, Facebook, LinkedIn, Email). Calculate ROI, CAC, and attribution for each channel.
requirements: Clean and merge data from multiple ad platforms into a single dataset
Calculate cost per acquisition (CAC) for each channel
Calculate return on ad spend (ROAS) for each channel
Build a multi-touch attribution model (linear attribution)
Identify the most cost-effective channel combination
Create a dashboard showing campaign performance metrics
Recommend budget reallocation based on analysis
client_context:
Subject: Q3 Marketing Performance

We spent ₹50L on marketing last quarter. We need to understand which channels delivered the best ROI so we can optimize the Q4 budget.

- Rohan (Client)
expected_deliverable: Marketing analysis report with CAC, ROAS, attribution model, and budget recommendations

title: Build Data Pipeline with Python and SQL
description: Design and build an automated ETL pipeline that extracts data from the production database, transforms it for analytics, and loads it into a reporting database. Use Python and scheduled SQL scripts.
requirements: Write SQL extraction queries for orders, users, and payments tables
Build Python transformation scripts (data cleaning, aggregation, joining)
Set up incremental loading strategy (only new/changed records)
Implement data validation checks at each pipeline stage
Schedule the pipeline to run daily at 2 AM
Add error handling and notification on failure
Document the pipeline architecture and data flow
client_context:
Subject: Analytics Data Pipeline

Our current reporting requires manual SQL queries, which is error-prone and time-consuming. We need an automated pipeline that refreshes our analytics tables daily.

- DevOps Team
expected_deliverable: Python ETL pipeline with SQL scripts, scheduling config, and documentation

title: Product Feature Adoption Analysis
description: Analyze which product features users are adopting and which are being ignored. Identify user segments that have high engagement with specific features and recommend improvements for underperforming features.
requirements: Query event tracking data to get feature usage counts per user
Build feature adoption funnel (viewed → tried → used regularly)
Segment users by adoption pattern (power users, casual, dormant)
Identify top 3 most adopted and bottom 3 least adopted features
Correlate feature adoption with user retention
Provide recommendations for improving adoption of bottom features
client_context:
Subject: Feature Adoption Analysis

We launched 5 new features last quarter but don't know which ones are actually being used. Let's analyze adoption data and decide which features to invest in further.

- Sarah (Product Manager)
expected_deliverable: Feature adoption analysis report with funnel, user segments, and recommendations
